title: Child Development Master Program Application and Fees
content:
Child Development Master Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 25, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

Dear candidate students;

In our Thesis/Non-Thesis Master's Programs, there will be a science exam;

1) In our thesis programs, 65% of the ALES in the Equal Weight score type, 35% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average,

2) In non-thesis programs, 50% of the undergraduate graduation grade, 50% of the science exam will be evaluated.

Applications of candidates who do not apply online, who are not graduates at the time of application, and who do not upload their ALES document and identity information to the application system during application will be considered invalid.

-Original or certified copy of undergraduate diploma

-Original or certified copy of undergraduate transcript

-ALES exam result document (for Thesis Program)

-Photocopy of identity card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

SPECIAL CONDITIONS TO BE LOOKED FOR IN CANDIDATES

Only graduates of the Child Development and Social Services departments of the Faculties of Health Sciences and Preschool Teaching, Psychological Counseling and Guidance, Psychology, and Special Education can apply to the Master's Program with Thesis.

Graduates of the Child Development and Social Services departments of the Faculties of Health Sciences and Preschool Teaching, Psychological Counseling and Guidance, Psychology, Special Education undergraduate degrees are accepted to the Non-Thesis Master's Program without scientific preparation, and students from outside the specified fields are accepted by applying the Scientific Preparation Program, provided that they take two courses in two semesters. They will be.

SCIENTIFIC PREPARATION COURSES:

Autumn Period:

CGE241 Development and Support Programs in Preschool Period

CGE317 Adolescence Development and Support Program

Spring semester:

CGE120 Development and Support Programs in Infancy

CGE216 Development and Support Programs During School Period

-ALES result document for thesis program applications;

Equal Weight at least 55 points

-Applicants will be accepted in order of success.

TUITION FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri
